name: bitesize-church-colshaw
description: Create a single page website for Bitesize Church, a friendly and welcoming community church based in Colshaw. The site should have the following sections: a warm hero section with a tagline and call to action, an about section explaining what Bitesize Church is, a Bitesize Brunch section explaining their monthly get-together events, an events section showing upcoming 2026 brunch dates, a visit us section with location and what to expect when you arrive, and a contact section with a simple enquiry form. The tone should be friendly, warm and inclusive. The brand colours are red, golden yellow and white.
